knowledge_base: Dolo 650 is a brand name for Paracetamol (also known as Acetaminophen). It is NOT Ibuprofen.
Dolo 650 is used to treat mild to moderate pain and reduce fevers.
The standard advice for a mild fever is to stay hydrated, rest, and take Paracetamol (like Dolo 650) as prescribed.
Never prescribe antibiotics to a patient without a physical doctor's consultation.
If symptoms persist for more than 3 days, advise the patient to schedule a follow-up consultation with their doctor.
For headaches, ensure the patient is drinking enough water and resting in a quiet, dark room.
